channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped bed/divqn, 4th March
item.description:
Flytippedbed/divan blocking pavement in Barnwell Rd. Yet again - PLEASE - can we have some posters here? I have been asking for a year

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Barnwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th March
item.description:
Flytipping at same location as previously reported.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog poo on the pavement opp 61 grayling rd, 4th March
item.description:
More dog excrement on the pavement opposite 61 Grayling Road. Please remove and put up more antidogfouling notices the length of Grayling and Bouverie Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 4th March
item.description:
Vehicle has been left and very badly parked, restricting access to the rest of Barnsbury Terrace and The Courtyard for at least a week. Notes have been left on vehicle to no avail.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Barnsbury Terrace, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead End Sign Not Perpendicular to Carriageway, 4th March
item.description:
This is probably a redundant sign altogether but if it is to remain, please can this be adjusted so that it faces approaching traffic into the cul de sac. It currently has no purpose in its location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost Appears to be missing a light, 4th March
item.description:
There is a column just before Birkbeck Station (on the nearside heading towards Crystal Palace) which appears not to have a light. The asset is appears to be 1882 and can be found near the central reservation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway beside no.57, 4th March
item.description:
A hole in the footpath of the alley - appeared today. Has been reported to Thames Water as we believe it may have been caused by a leak from the nearby drainpipe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pond Square, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1, Knighton Park Road Greater London, England SE26 5JZ, 4th March
item.description:
Loose manhole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knighton Park Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 4th March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/03/26 11:44 Graffiti - Non offensive Lat/Long - 51.4320187, 0.0375661 what3words - grand.ages.option Nearest address - 108 Lambscroft Avenue, Grove Park, London, SE9 4PQ Mottingham Recreation ground. Remove graffiti from cycle barrier at entrance Reference - 5379986 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Open 04/03/2026 11:43 Mottingham Recreation ground. Remove graffiti from cycle barrier at entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambscroft Avenue, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 4th March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/03/26 10:22 Abandoned Vehicle Lat/Long - 51.4229307, -0.0518882 what3words - olive.wounds.author Nearest address - 85 Newlands Park, Sydenham, London, SE26 5PW Car hasn’t moved for several months believe it’s been abandoned! Blue Kia- No tax or MOT either! Reference - 5379684 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 04/03/2026 10:21 Car hasn’t moved for several months believe it’s been abandoned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Adjust Parking Sign so that it is Legible, 4th March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for the parking sign outside 122 Parish Lane to be adjusted so that it correctly faces parallel to the carriageway? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue Cycling Sign Not Facing Carriageway, 4th March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for the blue cycling sign outside 132 Parish Lane to be orientated so that the sign faces the carriageway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anerley Food Stores, 4th March
item.description:
Dear Sir or Madam I am writing this email to you today to discuss a important problem with Anerley Hill. I have lived at Crystal Palace for many many years everyday two team's from Veolia attend Anerley Hill everyday to clean up all the rubbish from what the shops put out all the time. I have got to know the two teams from Veolia and can I say a big thank you to them they are Tony James Dave and Jason they do a great job in what they do. I am writing to you is everyday they come and take to rubbish away then after they leave the same shops put more and more rubbish out I just want to know what can you do about it because I think it is sad to see them work so hard and Bromley council are DOING NOTHING to stop the shop. Do they even have a licence to do this or they need to start being fined . Just in case you can do something about it the main shops are. :The Miami chicken what keep on putting raw chicken out :The Shillings post office what keep on putting a lot of rubbish out But the biggest problem up Anerley Hill is the :Anerley Food Stores they always have a load of rubbish old food boxes and black bags full of stuff from their shop soon as the two teams pull away they keep on putting a load of rubbish out after it has been cleared up so I hope I see action on Anerley Hill if NOT I will be going to the MP so let's just hope Bromley council will do something about it Kind regards Mr Jones
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108-110, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signpost Bent, 4th March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for your team to fix the bent signpost outside 155 Parish Lane in Penge. It appears to have been hit by a car.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and waste on pavement, 4th March
item.description:
This is a health hazard, and I spoke to a woman in a wheelchair who said there is sometimes rubbish on the pavement. That is actually dangerous for her

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking Sign Not Parellel to Carriageway, 4th March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for this parking sign to be adjusted so it is readable from the carriageway. This is opposite 160 Parish Lane. Approximately the What3Words location is ///eagles.loyal.boil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping ... again, 4th March
item.description:
Flytipped furniture again ... please pick up. Fly tipping occurs here everyday ... what is the council doing to prevent it?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tudor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked without permit, 4th March
item.description:
Be there a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubsall Close, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue crashed & broken into car abandoned, 4th March
item.description:
Blue crashed & broken into car abandoned outside the park. It has stickers all over it. The car has been there about 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Baring Road, Chinbrook, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bright blue car parked in disabled bay opposite #36 - no disabled badge., 4th March
item.description:
Bright blue car parked in disabled bay opposite #36 Ronve road - no disabled badge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Ronver Road, Catford South, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
